guide:
## Quest Guide: Crazy Larry / Toomba H&G Questtest

**Level:** All  
**Class:** All  
**NPCs:** Crazy Larry, Toomba  
**Location:** Kelinar, SOM  

Something in the air is causing chaos. Look out for interesting folks needing your help.

Depending on your level, the items you're asked to get will vary. Always hunt mobs of your own level to obtain the items he asks for. "Make sure to go after the ones you can defeat. No use going into battle knowing you're going to lose." This quest is **repeatable**.

### Level 60

**Crazy Larry:** Roaming the road NE of Kelinar Village in Kelinar (S). Paranoid, asking for supplies to weather the coming war:
- **Bar of Reinforced Tin** – gobs in Vox, perma
- **Scaled Snake Booties** – young anacondas in Kerra Isle / East Toxx, or Cryptkeepers in Dead Hills
- **Piercing Fish Whistle** – large/ancient dragon eels in ZK or Dead Hills (W)
- **Frog Hair Mats** – Froglok Channelers/Foragers outside/inside Guk, or LB mobs near the King in Guk Dungeon

**Toomba:** Near the Evil Waysender, by a rock in SOM. Wants to bash things more than usual. Obtain:
- **Shiny Boar Hoof** – Murkwood Boars nearby
- **Poisoned Spider Fang** – Murkwood Spiders nearby
- **Swampvine Berries** – Brutes nearby
- **Flaxbread** – buy from merchant (250 tunar)

### Level 45+

**Crazy Larry asks for:**
- Frog Hair Tufts – lower level frogs in Guk
- Sturdy Bar of Tin ??
- Shrill Fish Whistle – sharks off coast in Mariel
- Padded Snake Booties – anacondas/pythos in Brokenskull Rock or Stonewatchers

### Level 20 and under

**Crazy Larry asks for:**
- Snake Booties – tree vipers near any city
- Bar of Tin – low level gobs
- Fish Whistle – drops off Pikes N of FP (TY Steven)
- Frog Hair – from Froglok villagers in Grobb

### Reward

You are rewarded with a **level/class specific item**, **XP**, and a **stack of new XP gems** (stack to ten, lasts for one hour). Each XP gem adds about **30k XP** to each mob you kill.
